checklist.label: Read packet.inputEvidence.phase2.imageSlotPlan before authoring or exporting imagery; do not invent image slots.
Read packet.inputEvidence.phase4 routesGenerated and buildResult so imagery targets the built site.
Read packet.inputEvidence.phase5 failures, remainingAdvisories, and validation evidence before image export and UI verification.
Read the resolved specialist SKILL.md before authoring phase work.
Fill the scaffolded phase artifact with contract-compliant evidence.
Run inspect-artifact before complete-phase and fix reported weaknesses.
Require reviewer notes to travel by --notes-file.

pageMatrixStrategy.model: Restaurant single-location depth with live-site route parity: menu-category x occasion x search-intent families, plus a genuine-fact neighborhood ring and a GEO truth-assertion page - identical route set to the deployed 2026-07-08 build
pageFamilies: Menu hub + 14 menu-category pages (owner-confirmed menu sections from src/data/menu.json)
Search-intent root landings - 8 (dish + near-me + soul-food + open-late + catering)
pageMatrixStrategy.crossLinkPlan: Menu sections <-> related occasions <-> matching intent landings; /catering-cedar-rapids/ <-> /occasions/office-and-party-catering/ (intent vs occasion framing); /open-late-cedar-rapids/ -> menu hub + /fish-and-chicken-near-me/; /location/ -> /contact/ + /about/ + /faq/ (disambiguation cluster); neighborhoods -> menu hub + nearest intent landing; home -> menu hub + top occasions + top intents. Occasions >=4 cross-links, intent landings >=2.
pageMatrixStrategy.routeParity: HARD CONSTRAINT for Phase 4: generate routes EXACTLY matching this matrix - the same 38 internal routes live at https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app since 2026-07-08. Zero deltas versus the approved archived matrix (run c0033522). URL stability protects the in-progress first indexing of the owned domain; any future route change requires redirects and a new approval.
pageMatrixStrategy.sapNote: No service-area SAP pages. The SW-quadrant neighborhood page remains REJECTED - no genuine SW local facts beyond city-wide app delivery = doorway risk; SW delivery reach stays as copy on /fish-and-chicken-near-me/. This matches the engine's sapEligible predicate: no location in data carries SAP town-fact minima.

imageSlotPlan: existing-93-asset-library - REUSE: 87 menu-item renders + occasion/marketing heroes + og image + logo produced in the archived run remain valid for the unchanged menu (same items, same prices); Phase 6 re-verifies manifest/selections/exports against this run rather than regenerating (~186 credits saved). Representational.
home-hero-animated - REUSE: owner-approved beach-loop video + webp keyframes. Representational.
open-late-hero - EXISTING from archived run (evening storefront-glow illustration for /open-late-cedar-rapids/); re-verify presence in Phase 6, regenerate only if missing. Representational.
catering-intent-hero - REUSE catering-party-pans hero on /catering-cedar-rapids/. Representational.
brand-logo - OWNER FILE DROP still pending at public/logo.png (shark-captain emblem, navy/gold); raster placeholder currently live; swap on delivery, no route impact. Not representational.
real-photography - OPEN: owner photos to replace representational renders when supplied; no route impact. Not representational.

requiredCroBlocks.note: Restaurant archetype carries no auto-dealer CRO block contract (croContractFor('restaurant', ...) === null). Restaurant conversion elements are planned per kind below; the call-only exception applies site-wide (owner decision, sealed in this run's Phase 0: no lead-form endpoint and no SMS number exist).
layoutSingleton: sticky mobile call bar (tel:, call-only) - mounted once in the layout, not per page
home: hero + single call CTA + 3 value-props strip (review-stat valueProp subject to the GBP count verification advisory)
style rule: matches interior pages (left h2s, white steel-bordered cards, navy shell-only, gold CTAs-only)
menu-hub-and-sections: order-online CTAs (external links as CTAs, not pages)
contact: NAP + map + caveated hours + directions + call CTA
documentedExceptions: lead form OMITTED site-wide (no site.leadForm.endpoint exists; owner call-only decision, Phase 0 sealed)
dual CTA reduced to single tel: call CTA (no SMS number exists; owner call-only decision)
trust content ships as 'why choose us' copy, not the auto-dealer 6-fact grid (fewer than six verified trust facts exist; KG7 omit-never-fabricate)
offer callout and financing block OMITTED (site.offers empty, site.financing.providers empty)

phase2.minimumPageCountRationale: 38 internal routes (>=25 floor, <=500 cap): 1 home + 1 menu hub + 14 menu sections (owner-confirmed menu paste) + 6 occasions + 8 search-intent landings + 4 info/faq/story landings + 1 location truth page + 2 neighborhoods + 1 contact. This is EXACTLY the route set live at https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app since 2026-07-08 (verified this run against src/data/landings.json 13 + occasions.json 6 + neighborhoods.json 2 + menu.json 14 sections + the three fixed routes). Route parity is deliberate: the owned domain is one day into its first indexing (still absent from SERP index per this run's sealed Phase 1), so URL stability is itself an SEO asset, and no sealed Phase 0/1 finding of this run adds a route that clears the anti-thin floor or removes one that fails it. External ordering links are CTAs (externalCount 0). If a neighborhood page's facts failed at authoring the count would drop to 36-37, still above floor - but both neighborhoods' facts are re-carried in this run's sealed Phase 1 entities/localModifiers, so no drop is expected.

commandsRun: node -e "walk dist/ and enumerate every index.html as a trailing-slash route; diff against the approved 38-route Phase 2 matrix"
grep -rl "208 reviews" dist/ (no matches — count-free review copy verified in built output)
grep -c for the four new menu-section description strings in dist/menu/{gizzards-and-livers,kids-meals,desserts,drinks}/index.html (all present)

buildResult.output: Astro 6 static build completed: 38 page(s) built in 2.48s; sitemap-index.xml created at dist; no build errors.
buildResult.routeParity: EXACT MATCH — dist/ contains 38 index.html routes; diff against the approved Phase 2 38-route matrix (trailing-slash form) reports zero missing and zero extra routes. Route parity hard constraint satisfied: identical route set to the live 2026-07-08 deploy.

liveRouteProof.summary: All six sampled live routes (home, menu hub, one menu section, one occasion, one neighborhood, location truth page) serve HTTP 200 from the deployed origin, closing the reviewer's live parity evidence gap. Note: live pages serve the pre-fix content until Phase 7 deploys this build.

buyerProofSummary: home: buyer intent (fresh fried fish/chicken takeout in Cedar Rapids) is above the fold with hero + single gold tel: call CTA + 3 value props; the review value prop now cites '4.4 stars on Google' attributed without a review count (count unverifiable live).

menu sections: priced item cards from the frozen 2026-07-07 owner paste with Menu JSON-LD, call CTA, order-online external CTAs, and a 'Photos are representational' note; the four small sections (kids-meals, desserts, drinks, gizzards-and-livers) now carry unique non-boilerplate hero/description copy naming their actual items.
occasions: hero + call CTA, featured menu items, >=5 FAQs, >=4 cross-links; catering occasion cross-links the catering intent landing.
intent/info/faq/story landings: hero + call CTA, body, FAQs where relevant, >=2 cross-links; disambiguation cluster (/location/ -> /contact/ + /about/ + /faq/) intact.
neighborhoods: single city-specific H1, genuine local facts (Moundview/Coe College/I-380; Marion via Hwy 100), proximity trust lines, town FAQ, >=400 chars unique body, NAP keeps HQ city.
contact: NAP (1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, (319) 221-1040) + map + caveated hours + directions + call CTA; no lead form (sealed owner call-only decision).
sourceOrGapNotes: Google review COUNT: GAP — live GBP count could not be verified from Google itself (google.com/search and Google Maps both refuse automated fetch; web search surfaced only third-party mirrors). Owner cited 208 on 2026-07-07; Wanderlog Google-mirror showed 192 on 2026-07-09. Per the sealed advisory's omit-never-fabricate floor the count was REMOVED: site.json valueProp now reads label '4.4 stars on Google', sublabel 'Rated by Cedar Rapids diners on Google'. No other file cites a review count; the /faq/ page and all landings cite 'Rated 4.4 on Google' attributed, count-free.
Hours: remain owner-UNCONFIRMED; every page keeps the call-to-confirm caveat — no hours claims added.
Payment policy: UNKNOWN (owner never stated); copy directs buyers to call to confirm payment methods — no payment claims.
Menu items/prices: frozen 2026-07-07 owner paste; untouched this phase (only section-level descriptions strengthened).
Item names 'Mystic' and 'Calypos' reproduced exactly as the owner paste spells them.

validationRuns.detail: Exit code 0. 11/11 validators passed: 6 blocking gates (schema-floor, route-completeness, cro-block-presence, do-not-ship-guards, sap-anti-doorway, graph-gate) and 5 advisories (has-generated-llms-txt, has-generated-robots-txt, no-todo-markers-in-artifacts, asset-references-exist, graph-presence). errorCount 0, warningCount 0.

validationRuns.target: dist/ (38 routes, Phase 4 artifactHash 74ac0805e884305f9514ca1376aec8935dae65a0b75ff0f9f8c418ac80dd2059) + live origin crawl surfaces
validationRuns.detail: Status ready_with_concerns: Blocking Findings: None; 6 non-blocking advisories. Measured: 38/38 unique titles and meta descriptions; one self-referencing live-origin canonical per page; single h1 per page; JSON-LD 0 parse errors (Restaurant 38, WebSite 38, WebPage 37, BreadcrumbList 37, FAQPage 21, Menu 1, ContactPage 1); single consistent NAP tuple; 0 broken internal links; 138 images 0 missing alt; tel: CTA on every page; real GA4 id everywhere; zero fixture flags; count-free review claim; robots.txt AI-crawler allow-list (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended); llms.txt 8 sections well-formed; sitemap 38/38 on-origin, no funnel paths; live 200 on /, /robots.txt, /llms.txt, /sitemap-index.xml, /menu/, /contact/, /faq/; live robots.txt identical to dist.

seoGeoAudit.auditTarget: dist/ (Phase 4 build, 38 routes) cross-checked against https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app crawl surfaces

remainingAdvisories: Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags are absent on all 38 pages (no og:title/og:description/og:url/og:type/og:image or twitter:*); social and chat-app link previews degrade. Not a factory gate; add an OG block in a future template round.

Structured openingHoursSpecification covers only Mon-Thu 11:00-22:00 and Sun 11:00-20:00 while the caveated display text also claims Fri-Sat 11am-11pm (source gap: business.json hours has no structured Fri-Sat entry). Deliberately not fixed: hours are owner-unconfirmed and the sealed constraint forbids adding hours claims; resolve when the owner confirms hours.

Five titles are 66-69 characters and may truncate in SERPs: /occasions/office-and-party-catering/ (69), /catering-cedar-rapids/ (68), /open-late-cedar-rapids/ (67), /fried-chicken-and-wings-cedar-rapids/ (66), /menu/seafood/ (66).
/menu/ meta description is 203 characters and will truncate around ~165 in SERPs; the clipped tail is non-primary (delivery-apps mention).
Hours remain owner-unconfirmed; every page and llms.txt correctly keep the 'please call to confirm' caveat until the owner confirms.

Dual visible phone display formats: tel: CTAs show +1-319-221-1040 while body copy shows (319) 221-1040; same number and schema-consistent, cosmetic only. Runtime CWV/Lighthouse is out of factory-validate scope and was not measured; route to local-launch-checklist after the Phase 7 deploy.

stopCondition: Stop after producing exactly one inspected phase artifact; do not continue to the next phase in the same invocation.
